# Talengineer

> Talengineer (https://talengineer.us) is a global marketplace for certified industrial automation engineers — PLC, robotics, machine vision, and electrical. Employers post projects in any language; AI parses the request into a structured scope of work with milestones, then matches pre-screened, platform-certified engineers. Payments run through milestone escrow (funds release only after employer approval), on-site work is verified with GPS check-ins and photo QC, and project chat is live-translated across 9 languages.

Positioning — two parallel lines:
1. US domestic: manufacturers hiring certified automation engineers for on-site commissioning, retrofits, and remote controls work.
2. Cross-border: overseas manufacturers (e.g., Chinese companies building plants in Mexico, Vietnam, Thailand) hiring local and cross-border engineers with bilingual collaboration built in.

## Core capabilities

- [Find Engineers](https://talengineer.us/talent): browse pre-screened engineer profiles; filter by skill, region, rate, and certification level. Every engineer passed a hands-on AI technical screening before listing.
- [Post a Project](https://talengineer.us/talent): describe your need in natural language (any of 9 languages); AI standardizes it into specs, scope of work, and milestone plan, then recommends matched engineers.
- [Rate Benchmarks](https://talengineer.us/rates): live hourly-rate market data (USD) by region and specialty, sourced from active engineer profiles. Also available as JSON: https://talengineer.us/api/talent/rate-benchmarks
- [Pricing](https://talengineer.us/pricing): transparent pricing — 15% platform fee on escrowed milestones (engineers keep 85%); founding customers pay 5% on their first 5 orders; first-milestone money-back guarantee.
- [Certification](https://talengineer.us/certification): 4 tracks (PLC / Robotics / Machine Vision / Electrical) × levels L1–L3. Timed 40-minute exam (10 questions: multiple-choice + scenario + deep analysis), AI-graded then human-reviewed before any certificate is issued. Only certified engineers can be assigned to projects — certification is an assignment gate, not a badge.
- [TalScore](https://talengineer.us/talscore): public quality-score algorithm (0–100): AI screening 25 + platform certification 25 + client ratings 30 (Bayesian-averaged to resist rating manipulation) + reliability 20 (dispute rate above 10% zeroes the dimension). Badge tiers: platinum ≥85, gold ≥70, silver ≥55, bronze below.
- [Trust Center](https://talengineer.us/trust): milestone escrow flow, refund path back to the employer, evidence-based dispute process, KYC / W-9 / insurance (COI) verification, GPS-geofenced check-ins and photo QC as an on-site delivery evidence chain.
- [Cost calculator](https://talengineer.us/calculator): free interactive tool — pick a specialty, region, and estimated hours to compare platform-certified engineer costs (live rate data) against local full-time hiring.
- [Case studies](https://talengineer.us/case-studies): delivery case studies from founding-cohort projects (published as each order completes).
- [Hire by specialty](https://talengineer.us/hire/plc): dedicated landing pages for PLC (/hire/plc), robotics (/hire/robotics), machine vision (/hire/vision), and electrical (/hire/electrical), each with regional rate ranges and certification details. Industry-specific pages: /hire/plc/automotive, /hire/plc/semiconductor, /hire/plc/food-beverage, /hire/plc/pharma, /hire/robotics/automotive, /hire/robotics/3c-electronics, /hire/vision/semiconductor, /hire/vision/packaging.
- [Plant-buildout hiring guides](https://talengineer.us/guides/mexico): country guides for manufacturers building plants abroad — Mexico (/guides/mexico), Vietnam (/guides/vietnam), Thailand (/guides/thailand) — covering local automation-talent supply, cross-border hybrid staffing, and regional rates.
- [Playbook](https://talengineer.us/playbook): guides on hiring and working with industrial automation talent, tagged by type (guide / market data / certification / case study), track, and audience.

## For AI agents & developers

- [Developer API](https://talengineer.us/developers): enterprise REST API v1 (API-key auth + HMAC-signed webhooks) to search certified engineers, create demands, and track project status programmatically.

## Facts

- Languages: English, 中文, Español, Tiếng Việt, हिन्दी, Français, Deutsch, 日本語, 한국어.
- Payments: Stripe milestone escrow; cross-border payouts via Stripe Connect. Funds release only after the employer approves each milestone.
- Platform fee: 15% (founding customers: 5% on first 5 orders). Applying and being listed as an engineer is free.
- Quality gates: hands-on AI technical screening at signup → platform certification exams (L1–L3, AI-graded + human-reviewed) → TalScore tracking on every completed order.
